title: Polystachya platybulbon
taxonomy: Polystachya platybulbon is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family comprises over 30,000 known species of orchids, with Polystachya platybulbon being a part of the larger group. Polystachya platybulbon is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae, which contains about 18,000 species of orchids. The genus Polystachya itself is a part of the tribe Vandeae, known for its diverse range of orchid species. Polystachya platybulbon is thus categorized under the kingdom Plantae, with its more specific classification being within the division Magnoliophyta.
